scripts.dev: concurrently -n bridge,web -c blue,yellow "npm run dev:bridge" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/shared run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/bridge run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/web run build
scripts.build:packages: npm run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/browser-launcher run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/electron run build
scripts.release:browser: npm run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/browser-launcher run release
scripts.release:electron: npm run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/electron run release
scripts.release: npm run release:browser && npm run release:electron
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/shared run build && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/bridge run typecheck && npm --workspace @nanoleaf-jazz/web run typecheck
